prep.summary: You need to prepare for your sync with Mark by reviewing the June 15 discussion with Praveena—which centered on Rebecca's transition, James's architectural coaching, and escalating the need for dedicated data architecture support. Today's agenda focuses on assigning Amit to the overarching business health scorecard—an initiative closely tied to the "Process Owner's Cockpit" and Celonis visualization efforts detailed in your recent work notes. Reviewing these interconnected threads will help you position Amit effectively to address the critical data integration and latency challenges facing the enterprise.
tasks: Finalize the candidate requirements for Rebecca's backfill—ensuring a better organizational fit.
Address the outstanding data architecture support escalation—specifically regarding the transition of "Picks" to Brian Klusman.
Assign Amit to the overarching business health scorecard—leveraging the framework Mark is architecting for the "Process Owner's Cockpit."
Align Amit's onboarding with the ongoing Celonis claims visualization pivot—specifically targeting the data latency challenges identified in the Snowflake and DL3 pipelines.
prep.title: Sync With Mark
